productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Belt
description: Crafted from 70% polyester and 30% polyurethane, this accessory taps into this season's love affair with belts. Made with special care for the fashion conscious and stylish youth, this stylish belt from united colors of benetton adds a glamorous touch to your attire. Wear it with skirts or dresses and look great both ways.Length: 82 cmMade of polyester/polyurethane for durabilityLatch style clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeBroad base to sit snug on the waistCareUse a brass polish to maintain latch shineWipe belt with clean dry cloth
